name: Narrow Wood Bin - Brightroom™
description:
Organize with ease using this Narrow Wood Bin from Brightroom™. Made of wood, this open-top bin has slats on the sides plus cutouts for easy holding. Designed in a rectangular shape, this wooden bin has a capacity of 418 cubic inches, giving you plenty of space for storing toys, clothes, books and more.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
